# Route List

| Method | Path | Handler | Description |
|--------|------|---------|-------------|
| GET | /api/employees | EmployeeController.list | List employees |
| POST | /api/employees | EmployeeController.create | Create employee |
| GET | /api/employees/:id | EmployeeController.get | Get employee by ID |
| PUT | /api/employees/:id | EmployeeController.update | Update employee |
| DELETE | /api/employees/:id | EmployeeController.delete | Delete employee |
